instruction: Open Mail and create a new draft message with the subject {SUBJECT} addressed to {TO}.
source: cove-original (intent-port of Thunderbird compose to Apple Mail, design 047 §3 adapter rule); Tier-C AppleScript reads the draft subject back

args: osascript -e 'tell application "Mail" to delete (every message of drafts mailbox whose subject is "{SUBJECT}")' 2>/dev/null || true

osascript -e 'tell application "Mail"' -e 'set m to make new outgoing message with properties {subject:"{SUBJECT}", content:"draft", visible:false}' -e 'tell m to make new to recipient with properties {address:"{TO}"}' -e 'save m' -e 'end tell' 2>/dev/null || true
